question: For the reaction $\text{A}(g) + \text{B}(g) \rightleftharpoons 2\text{C}(g)$, the equilibrium constant is $K_c = 58$. If equilibrium concentrations of A and B are $0.77~\text{M}$ and $0.71~\text{M}$ respectively, calculate the equilibrium concentration of C.
